title: Y@sar'elah #3480
definition:
Jesharelah = "these are upright"

 1) a Levite and son of Asaph and leader of the 7th course of the
    musicians
nasbUsage:

 1) a Levite and son of Asaph and leader of the 7th course of the
    musicians

    NASB:  a son of Asaph
